title: Replacement crews reduce trust before they add capacity
discovery: Fresh manpower helps the unit survive, but new crew members initially lower cohesion, prediction accuracy, and trust in the commander.
evidence: source_library/41_united_states_army_air_forces.md:15-17 - rotation policy and replacement limits are part of how the Army managed exhaustion.
source_library/50_army_ground_forces.md:15-17 - Army Ground Forces controlled training scale and replacement flow.
source_library/19_bomb-tank.md:15-17 - Bomb is an explicit replacement-personnel case that turns the vehicle into a memory vessel.
why: Replacement should not be a free heal. It should restore numbers while temporarily degrading coordination and implicit knowledge.

variable.name: replacement_familiarity
variable.definition: How well replacements know the unit and each other.

mechanic: Arrival, onboarding, and trust ramp for replacement personnel.
pressure: The unit can be numerically stronger and tactically worse at the same time.
